ogTitle: Scotts Head vs Seaforth: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Scotts Head and Seaforth.
heading: Scotts Head vs Seaforth — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Scotts Head, New South Wales and Seaforth, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Scotts Head has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Seaforth (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Scotts Head or Seaforth safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Scotts Head has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Seaforth scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Scotts Head scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Seaforth scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Scotts Head or Seaforth?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Scotts Head has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
